query: 宁德时代按资产类型拆分的持仓规模是多少

args.sql: WITH latest_size AS (SELECT MAX(date) AS max_date FROM fund_size), latest_holding AS (SELECT MAX(date) AS max_date FROM fund_holding) SELECT s.asset_type AS 资产类型, SUM(s.fund_size) AS 规模总和 FROM fund_size s JOIN latest_size ON s.date = latest_size.max_date JOIN fund_holding h ON s.fund_code = h.fund_code AND h.date = latest_holding.max_date GROUP BY s.asset_type LIMIT 200;

plan.rationale: 查询最新日期的基金规模和持仓信息，按资产类型分组，统计持仓规模总和
